message:
chore(beads): comprehensive upgrade protection beads with full documentation

Updated 12 beads for the Upgrade Asset Naming Contract Protection System:

Epic (ntm-chv5):
- Full description with 4-phase implementation plan
- Rationale for defense-in-depth approach

Phase 1 (CLOSED):
- ntm-4tmq: Contract tests (implemented)
- ntm-2o0p: CI upgrade-check job (implemented)
- ntm-abrt: Post-release verification (implemented)

Phase 2 (P2):
- ntm-21mz: Enhanced error messages with design sketches
- ntm-beeq: Documentation with outline
- ntm-chv5.1: Post-upgrade binary verification (NEW)

Phase 3 (P3):
- ntm-0yxf: Fallback asset discovery with strategy chain
- ntm-chv5.2: Checksum verification (NEW)
- ntm-chv5.3: Download progress indicator (NEW)

Phase 4 (P4):
- ntm-9dlk: Dynamic .goreleaser.yaml parsing
- ntm-kwjk: Pre-commit hook integration

All beads include:
- Detailed descriptions with problem statements
- Acceptance criteria for open items
- Design notes with code sketches
- Parent-child relationships
- Labels for filtering
- Dependency graph
